sourcebooks: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
purpose: Audit and classify KOTOR + Jedi Academy Training Manual feat parity after global taxonomy cleanup. Use mechanics/source context rather than title keywords.

uploadedPdfs: SAGA EDITION - Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide.pdf
SW Saga - Jedi Academy Training Manual (optimized).pdf
observedSections: JATM feat entries from Power of the Force / equipment and training material
notes: This phase is source parity and implementation-fit auditing, not a broad runtime implementation pass.
Classification must use prerequisites, benefit text, runtime mechanics, and source context, not title words such as Force, Surge, or Strike.
Ambiguous classification should be marked source_review rather than forced into a tag.

expectedFeats.name: Accelerated Strike
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Once per encounter full attack as standard action with proficient weapons; not an attack bonus.

expectedFeats.name: Conditioning
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Skill reroll plus once-per-encounter Fortitude reaction; should not be unconditional Fortitude.

expectedFeats.name: Critical Strike
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Two swift action setup for next melee attack with Weapon Focus weapon.

expectedFeats.name: Flurry
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Light weapons/lightsabers only; +2 melee attack and -5 Reflex until next turn.

expectedFeats.name: Force Readiness
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Not a Force feat by prerequisite; resource timing rule.

expectedFeats.name: Gearhead
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Time/economy skill-use rule for Mechanics/Use Computer.

expectedFeats.name: Implant Training
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Suppresses active implant Will penalty and extra CT step; relies on explicit implant tags.

expectedFeats.name: Improved Rapid Strike
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Light melee/lightsaber Rapid Strike upgrade; not static damage.

expectedFeats.name: Increased Agility
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Climb/swim/jump distance and climbing Reflex handling.

expectedFeats.name: Logic Upgrade: Self-Defense
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Droid-only active choice among defenses.

expectedFeats.name: Logic Upgrade: Tactician
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Droid Aid Another attack support; not self attack bonus.

expectedFeats.name: Mandalorian Training
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Charging Fire-specific attack rider.

expectedFeats.name: Poison Resistance
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: +5 Fortitude against poison and half damage if poison succeeds.

expectedFeats.name: Power Blast
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Ranged attack option; explicit slider/tradeoff.

expectedFeats.name: Quick Skill
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Requires persistent selected skill; affects take 10/take 20 timing.

expectedFeats.name: Republic Military Training
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Incoming attack while behind cover; not passive DR.

expectedFeats.name: Sith Military Training
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Once-per-encounter reaction debuff around defeated/DT-exceeded target.

expectedFeats.name: Sniper Shot
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Ranged attack option with Reflex penalty rider.

expectedFeats.name: Tumble Defense
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Opponent Acrobatics/Tumble DC context; not actor defense.

expectedFeats.name: Withdrawal Strike
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
expectedFeats.notes: Requires chosen melee group/exotic weapon.

expectedFeats.name: Fast Surge
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: No Force prerequisite; despite Surge in the name, this is a second wind action-economy feat.

expectedFeats.name: Follow Through
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: After melee damage drops a target; interacts with Cleave.

expectedFeats.name: Force Regimen Mastery
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: Force Sensitivity/Use the Force prerequisite; requires regimen picker/cards rather than static math.

expectedFeats.name: Intuitive Initiative
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: Use the Force prerequisite/context; Initiative reroll.

expectedFeats.name: Keen Force Mind
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: +2 Use the Force only for mind-affecting Force powers.

expectedFeats.name: Long Haft Strike
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: Lightsaber Pike/Long-handle Lightsaber double-weapon treatment; ignore fandom homebrew expansion.

expectedFeats.name: Relentless Attack
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: Requires matching Double Attack selected weapon context.

expectedFeats.name: Unswerving Resolve
expectedFeats.sourcebook: Jedi Academy Training Manual
expectedFeats.notes: Temporary Force Point/resource rider after fear/mind-affecting effect fails to affect you.

taxonomyCorrections.name: Fast Surge
taxonomyCorrections.reason: No Force prerequisite and benefit is Second Wind action economy; current source context supports general/resource classification, not Force feat classification.

outOfScope.reason: Force Regimen Mastery may grant regimen picks, but individual regimen text/effects need their own source pass and picker/card data.
Republic/Sith Military Training, Conditioning, and Unswerving Resolve need combat/result/reaction contexts before full automation.
Withdrawal Strike and Relentless Attack need persistent weapon choice and tactical context before full roll enforcement.

recommendedNextWork: Implement or harden attack option cards for Critical Strike, Improved Rapid Strike, Mandalorian Training, and selected KOTOR melee/ranged options.
Add poison defense hook so Poison Resistance and Bio-Stabilizer Implant share a single poison-immunity/resistance path.
Create source-reviewed Force Regimen entries before expanding Force Regimen Mastery beyond entitlement/picker metadata.
Build a reaction/result hook backlog for Conditioning, Republic Military Training, Sith Military Training, and Unswerving Resolve.
